title: Heart, We Will Forget Him!
content:
Heart, we will forget him!
    You and I, to-night!
    You may forget the warmth he gave,
    I will forget the light.

    When you have done, pray tell me,
    That I my thoughts may dim;
    Haste! lest while you're lagging,
    I may remember him!
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Heart, We Will Forget Him!"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
